description: Round toed, brown, slip-on loafers with stitched detail around the toe box Brown leather upper with reinforced overlay at the heel collar and elasticated inserts at the sides of the tongue Fabric inner with a soft footbed Upper adhered and stitched to the outsole Rubber outsole, extends in front to form a toe guard and at the back to form a heel guard, has terraced lugs around the periphery and textured grooves in the centre Comes with a shoe bag
